function About() { return (

About Me

I'm a passionate MERN Stack Developer with hands-on internship experience at Ypsilon IT Solutions Pvt. Ltd. I specialize in building scalable full-stack web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js.

💼 Internship Experience

6 months real-world development experience in full-stack projects.

🚀 Live Project

Developed & deployed ShopNix E-commerce platform.

⚡ Core Strength

REST APIs, Authentication (JWT), Scalable Backend Logic.

); } export default About;
